positive: A mesmerizing, highly detailed stylized illustration of celestial botanicals and mythical flora. The composition features a central arrangement of glowing crescent moons, interconnected glowing vines, and exotic, abstract flowers (like glowing lotus pods and fractal petals). The style should be neo-traditional vector art meets magical realism, emphasizing clean, bold silhouettes and strong, deep contrast. Use a limited, moody color palette of indigo, cosmic purple, deep teal, and luminous gold accents. The background should be dark and atmospheric, allowing the glowing elements to pop. High contrast, highly intricate detail, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
